channel.title: +Paper on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Paper on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Book-binding
item.description: Tape binding Need big stapler, cover cardboard and tape. YT. Spiral binding Items special punching machine. Steel Binding rings, or plastic spirals Cover material Plastic Cardboard Binder clips 51 mm Large - 240 sheets. Punching and tying Can use tags. Stitching Need good jumper.
